title: Staff Product Designer
intro: Strengthened the foundations of a design system used across Pleo’s web and mobile products.

details.lead: Led the introduction of semantic design tokens
details.rest: across design and code, building Figma libraries, and migrating components.

details.lead: Designed and implemented accessible UI foundations,
details.rest: including a WCAG–compliant focus indicator and form accessibility guidelines.

details.lead: Contributed directly to the codebase
details.rest: (React + TS) by implementing components and fixing styling and accessibility issues.

details.lead: Maintained and evolved the design system’s Figma libraries
details.rest: (tokens, components, and brand assets) used by 20+ designers.

title: Senior Product Designer
intro: Worked across product design and design systems for an enterprise SaaS platform focused on website governance and optimisation.

details.lead: Co-founded the design systems team
details.rest: and helped define its processes, responsibilities, and roadmap.

details.lead: Designed and implemented accessible UI components,
details.rest: authored UX guidelines, and built UI libraries in Figma and Sketch.

details.lead: Designed product features for a data-heavy enterprise web application,
details.rest: including dashboards and account settings.

title: Product Designer
intro: Designed digital experiences for a Dutch health insurer, working across UX research, product design, and front-end implementation.

details.lead: Designed features and flows for customer-facing websites and iOS and Android apps
details.rest: through wireframes and interactive prototypes.

details.lead: Implemented responsive website designs using HTML and CSS,
details.rest: translating design specifications into production front-end code.

details.lead: Conducted usability tests and performed a top task analysis
details.rest: to prioritise improvements to the customer experience.

title: UX Researcher
intro: Conducted usability studies at a UX research consultancy, translating findings into actionable design recommendations.

details.lead: Planned and moderated usability studies,
details.rest: including participant recruitment, test scripting, and moderation.

details.lead: Synthesised research findings into clear UX recommendations
details.rest: supported by wireframes and interaction concepts.

details.lead: Delivered projects for clients across various industries
details.rest: such as banking, public transport, pension funds, and online marketplaces.

title: UX Designer
intro: Improved the UX of a complex enterprise SaaS platform used to manage documents and business processes.

details.lead: Conducted usability research
details.rest: including participant recruitment, test scripting, moderation, and analysis.

details.lead: Turned research insights into wireframes and interaction concepts
details.rest: to guide product improvements.

details.lead: Collaborated with product and engineering teams
details.rest: to resolve usability issues and improve overall workflow.

title: UX Design Intern
intro: Researched the UX of a complex enterprise SaaS platform used to manage documents and business processes.

details.lead: Evaluated the product
details.rest: through contextual inquiries, stakeholder interviews, and a heuristic evaluation.

details.lead: Documented usability issues and user needs
details.rest: in a research report.

details.lead: Proposed UX improvements
details.rest: supported by wireframes and interaction design recommendations.

title: UX Research Intern
intro: Supported UX research projects for major Dutch and international clients at a UX research consultancy.

details.lead: Conducted usability tests,
details.rest: including participant recruitment, test scripting, and moderation.

details.lead: Communicated research insights and design recommendations
details.rest: through reports and presentations.

details.lead: Contributed to projects for clients
details.rest: including PayPal, Microsoft, the Dutch government, ING Bank, and KLM Royal Dutch Airlines.
